description: Local supply-chain install gate for npm packages and VS Code extensions with Socket, Codex, and PI review support.
commit_message:
Fix Codex security findings across install guard and lockfile scans

Address 11 reported issues: scan full lockfiles on first bare install,
download lockfile-pinned tarballs with integrity checks, reject non-registry
specs, fix inverted Socket risk scoring, treat expired npm signing keys as
unverified, parse package-manager args with leading flags, guard npm stage
approve with OTP options, skip workspace selectors as package specs, add a
fish-compatible shell hook, quote Socket tokens safely in
